rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE content, with type scopes for constants and equations, implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL features or explicit declarations.
Use only valid AADL feature names and types in AGREE expressions.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type scopes.
Do not reference non-visible identifiers or undefined types in AGREE contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence
